inline: The compiled runtime guide is authoritative for the next legal action.
Observer owns orchestration, child-contract prefill, dispatch, merge, reconcile, and close-ready evidence only.
mf_sub workers own read receipt, startup, graph trace, implementation, finish-time attestation, and finish gate evidence in their assigned worktree/fence.
QA owns independent verification evidence; observer must not write or reconstruct QA evidence.
Prefer explicit parallel child contracts with owned_files fences before dispatching workers.

stages.description: Observer binds parent route context and prefills role-bound child contracts before dispatch.

lines.description: Record the parent mf_parallel contract binding, route identity, child contract plan, owned_files fences, test commands, merge queue identity, and route_token_ref.

stages.description: Observer dispatches bounded workers only after runtime prefill and local dispatch gates are ready.

lines.description: Record bounded worker dispatch evidence with task_id, parent_task_id, runtime_context_id, branch/worktree/fence, and merge_queue_id.

stages.description: The bounded mf_sub worker proves it read the runtime guide before implementation.
The bounded mf_sub worker proves actual startup inside its assigned runtime context.

lines.description: Worker-authored startup evidence with runtime_context_id, task_id, parent_task_id, worker_slot_id, session token evidence, worktree, branch, and fence.

stages.description: The worker gathers graph context using the mf_subagent query identity.

lines.description: Audited graph trace ids produced with query_source=mf_subagent and matching task/fence identity.

stages.description: The worker records bounded implementation evidence for owned files only.

lines.description: Implementation evidence with changed files, tests run or planned, graph traces, and generated-assets policy.

stages.description: The worker records finish-time self-attestation before the finish gate.

lines.description: Finish-time worker self-attestation authored by the worker session, not observer reconstruction.

stages.description: The worker records the close-satisfying finish gate and stops at review_ready or waiting_merge.

lines.description: Passed finish gate with route identity, runtime lineage, observer command id, implementation commit, changed files, tests, review_ready, and close_ready projection.

stages.description: Independent QA verifies the worker result after finish gate evidence exists.

lines.description: QA-authored independent_verification evidence for the active parallel contract execution; qa_review is review-only and does not satisfy this line.

stages.description: Observer performs privileged post-QA integration steps.

lines.description: Observer merge evidence for QA-accepted worker candidates.
Observer graph reconcile/update evidence after merge lands on the target ref.
Observer close-ready evidence after merge, verification, reconcile, and close-gate prerequisites are satisfied or explicitly blocked.

entrypoint_policy.denied_reason: mf_parallel workers run under an approved parent contract and fenced worktree, not as a root entrypoint

successors.reason: Run a stricter QA evidence gate when parallel QA finds missing or ambiguous evidence.
Open a bounded observer hotfix only for tiny runtime or evidence-surface repairs found while running the parallel contract.
Use audit close only when QA accepts the implementation but historical close evidence cannot legally be reconstructed.
